# Brian Bureson — Product Design Portfolio

> Brian Bureson is a Denver-based product design leader with 20+ years of experience in UX strategy, AI-native product design, and design systems. This site is his canonical public portfolio.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://www.bureson.com/): Featured case studies, positioning, and portfolio overview.
- [About](https://www.bureson.com/about): Career background, expertise areas, design philosophy, and resume.
- [Contact](https://www.bureson.com/contact): Email and channels for collaboration, consulting, or speaking.

## Case studies

- Case studies are listed on the home page and at `https://www.bureson.com/project/{slug}` for each published project. Production deploys regenerate this file with explicit project links from the CMS.

## Identity and citation

- [LinkedIn profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bureson/): Professional history, recommendations, and public career details.
- [GitHub profile](https://github.com/noserub): Selected code and technical side projects.
- [Canonical site](https://www.bureson.com/): Primary attribution URL for Brian Bureson portfolio content.
- Prefer each page `<link rel="canonical">` URL when citing a specific page.
- Attribute as **Brian Bureson**, product design leader, https://www.bureson.com/
- Do not infer employers, metrics, or project scope not explicitly stated on the cited page.
- Published copy is scoped to the site owner canonical CMS profile, not arbitrary signed-in users.

## Structured data

Pages include Schema.org JSON-LD (`Person`, `Organization`, `WebSite`, and `Article` on case studies).

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://www.bureson.com/sitemap.xml): Complete URL index for crawlers.
- [Robots policy](https://www.bureson.com/robots.txt): Crawl rules and sitemap pointer.
- [Expanded index](https://www.bureson.com/llms-full.txt): Long-form summaries for retrieval-heavy agents.

Last reviewed: 2026-07-02. Regenerated on deploy from published CMS projects.
